text: Think procrastination is a modern thing. Something phones did to us? The ancient Greeks would laugh. Thousands of years ago, they were obsessed with this exact puzzle. How can a person know the smart thing to do, truly know it, and still not do it? They even had a word for it. And what that word reveals about you is kind of wild.
